name_cn:
CELINE FOLCO New Fall/Winter Collection
Continuing the Triumph motif, retro crossbody, classic print that never looks old-fashioned, light and playful, durable and wear-resistant, symbolic, simple structure, adjustable strap length
Style No.: 191502 Monogram Brown
Size: 18*17*6.5cm (with original box)
